user_query:
I'm a retired bassist living off catalog royalties and trying to keep things low‑drama. I dropped three rough message drafts and my Q3 2025 royalty ledger into the workspace. Please clean up my communications and prep a concise quarterly update:

Inputs:
- input/raw_messages.jsonl (three lines; each line is a JSON object with fields id, recipient, context, text)
- input/royalty_ledger.csv (columns: date,source,type,track,amount_usd,due_date,status,notes)
- input/contacts.csv (columns: name,email,role)

Deliverables:
1) Rewrite the rough messages for a calm, matter‑of‑fact tone (no added drama; keep them brief and clear). Save to output/messages_rewritten.jsonl, one JSON object per line with fields: id, recipient, rewritten_text. Constraint: Do not alter or omit any numbers (e.g., $145.00), any ISO dates in the form YYYY‑MM‑DD, or any track titles that appear in single quotes in the originals; they must appear verbatim in the rewritten_text.

2) Generate a concise "Q3 2025 Royalty Status" report from input/royalty_ledger.csv for the period 2025‑07‑01 through 2025‑09‑30. Save to output/royalty_status_summary.md. Include the following sections:
- Totals by Source: each source with the sum of amount_usd for entries dated in that period.
- Late or Pending Items: a bullet list of any rows in that period where status is late or pending (include source, track, amount, due_date, and status).
- Notes: 1–3 short bullets highlighting anything noteworthy (e.g., a one‑off sync, noticeable month‑over‑month changes, or late items).
Keep it readable and succinct.

3) Draft two short, send‑ready emails (<=150 words each) using input/contacts.csv and the ledger facts. Save both in a single JSON array at output/email_drafts.json, where each element has: to, subject, body.
- Email A: To the Royalty Administrator (use the email from contacts.csv). Subject should reference the "August 2025 mechanical for 'Low Ceiling'". In the body, politely request a status update and include the exact amount $145.00 and due date 2025‑09‑30 from the ledger.
- Email B: To my Accountant (use the email from contacts.csv). Provide a brief Q3 2025 summary: totals by source (from the report) and a one‑line mention of any late or pending items.

Validation artifact:
4) Create output/messages_validation.csv with columns: id,numbers_preserved,dates_preserved,quoted_titles_preserved. For each message in input/raw_messages.jsonl, mark yes if every numeric token (including currency amounts), every ISO date (YYYY‑MM‑DD), and every single‑quoted track title from the original appears exactly in the corresponding rewritten_text; otherwise no.

Please work only with the provided files and produce the four outputs at the exact paths specified above. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
